FIGURE . Percentage of Neisseria gonorrhoeae isolates with elevated minimum inhibitory concentrations (MICs)* to ceftriaxone, cefixime, and azithromycin — Gonococcal Isolate Surveillance Project, United States, 2009–2018 
Source: CDC. Sexually Transmitted Disease Surveillance 2018. https://www.cdc.gov/std/stats18/default.htm .
* Elevated MIC = ceftriaxone ≥0.125 µ g/mL; cefixime ≥0.25 µ g/mL; azithromycin ≥2.0 µ g/mL.
